subject: 📊FL POLL ALERT: TOO CLOSE TO CALL

body:
POLL ALERT IN FLORIDA. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37018499:snfW3NbWN:m:1:1328517760:E107AF3932A964BA5445463C0E619A91:r)
---

_**"Too Close to Call".**_
Friend - That's what a poll that just came out of Florida said about my campaign against my Democrat opponent.

**I know I've reached out to you before, but this new poll shows just how close and tough this campaign is going to be. But in order to face my Democrat opponent, I must first win my Republican Primary on August 30th.**

**[Can I count on your support, Friend?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37018500:snfW3NbWN:m:1:1328517760:E107AF3932A964BA5445463C0E619A91:r)**

The balance of the Senate depends on what happens here in the Sunshine State. That's why Barack Obama and his Democrat pals are already involved with this race, spending millions to see my campaign defeated.

Your financial contribution is critical to my success and ensuring the Senate stays in Republican control.

| [** DONATE $25 TODAY >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37018500:snfW3NbWN:m:1:1328517760:E107AF3932A964BA5445463C0E619A91:r)

[** DONATE $500 TODAY >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37018504:snfW3NbWN:m:1:1328517760:E107AF3932A964BA5445463C0E619A91:r)
---

Since announcing my campaign just over one month ago, I've seen a lot of support but I'm at a disadvantage: my opponent has been running his campaign for over a year and raising money for just as long. **[But with your support today, we can overcome a late start to this race.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37018499:snfW3NbWN:m:1:1328517760:E107AF3932A964BA5445463C0E619A91:r)**

The fight to keep the Republican Majority in the United States Senate rests on the backs of Florida voters. I know this is a big responsibility. When I made the decision to run for re-election, I didn't make it lightly and I knew we would face an uphill battle. _But, Friend, the important things in life are hardly easily won..._

I know with your support we can win this race and keep the Senate Red!

On behalf of the entire Rubio family, thank you for your support and friendship. **

Thanks,

Marco Rubio

P.S. I am running for re-election because there is still more work to do in the Senate, but if we lose the majority, I cannot finish that work. August will be one of the most critical months in my re-election campaign and I need to make sure we continue to build the momentum needed to win. **[Friend, will you be part of continuing the momentum to victories in August and November?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37018499:snfW3NbWN:m:1:1328517760:E107AF3932A964BA5445463C0E619A91:r)**

[** DONATE TODAY **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37018499:snfW3NbWN:m:1:1328517760:E107AF3932A964BA5445463C0E619A91:r)

body:
Help me fight back against the dishonest and totally biased media. |

Peter, We’re not just fighting against Hillary Clinton... We are running against the very dishonest and totally biased media! It’s time to hold the media accountable for trying to rig this election against us. Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey right now and help me spread the truth about our movement. All too often I’m asked about a “poll” put out by a liberal organization that says the American people disagree with our common-sense reforms to fix our country. Well, Peter, with your help today, the next time I’m being interviewed, I will have my own poll that shows that the American people disagree with the dishonest media! TAKE THE SURVEY NOW >> Since Day ONE, the media has written off this campaign. They said we were doomed. But together, you and I proved the pundits wrong and ended up getting more votes than ANY Republican candidate in the history of our Party. And you know what? Every time I see one more biased report from the dishonest media, I’m reminded that we’re on the RIGHT side of this fight. Hillary Clinton STILL can’t admit that she lied about sending classified top-secret emails and that she deleted 3O,OOO to cover her tracks. Can you imagine if I set up a secret server, stored top secret information on it, jeopardized our national security, deleted 3O,OOO records, LIED about it, and then used the defense that my brain “short-circuited”? The media would single-handedly destroy our campaign! I’ve always known that the media was out to get Republicans. But this campaign has opened my eyes to how truly biased and dishonest they are. We cannot let the media get away with it. We MUST fight back. Please make it your priority today to take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey. Thank you, Donald J. Trump TAKE THE SURVEY NOW >>

name: Team Cole
subject: Update from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend -- Another busy week for the Cole for Governor campaign. On Monday, Bill held a town hall meeting in Clarksburg to talk about tackling the drug epidemic impacting West Virginians. He spoke with dozens of people who shared their personal stories of how this epidemic has affected them and their families. You can read about his visit by clicking [HERE](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwvmetronews.com%2F2016%2F08%2F08%2Frepublican-gubernatorial-candidate-links-drug-epidemic-and-economy-at-clarksburg-town-hall%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_from_ct&n=1). On Thursday, Bill held another town hall in Wheeling to talk about creating good paying jobs and putting West Virginians back to work. As Senate President, Bill has fought to create good paying jobs and will continue to make that his number one priority as Governor of West Virginia. Click [HERE](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.theintelligencer.net%2Fnews%2Ftop-headlines%2F2016%2F08%2Fbill-cole-talks-jobs-during-stop-at-west-virginia-independence-hall-in-wheeling%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_from_ct&n=2) to read about the town hall.
Bill also made a surprise visit to the Charleston office to thank all our volunteers for their hard work and dedication!
As Bill criss crosses the state getting his message out, the feedback has been terrific. An editorial in [The Intelligencer](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.theintelligencer.net%2Fopinion%2Flocal-columns%2F2016%2F08%2Frejecting-the-w-va-establishment%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_from_ct&n=3) called Bill Cole the anti-establishment candidate ready to turn West Virginia's economy around and create good paying jobs for West Virginia workers. They [also praised](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.theintelligencer.net%2Fopinion%2Feditorials%2F2016%2F08%2Fw-va-in-need-of-exit-strategy%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_from_ct&n=4) his mission to reform state government and deal with the state's budget crisis. Bill is the only candidate for Governor who has both the experience and a plan to tackle these critical issues.

Bill's message is resonating with West Virginia voters and the Democrats are getting scared. That's why a Pro-Clinton Super PAC is coming to Jim Justice's defense to spend $1.8 million in negative attack ads against Bill.

And after getting [attacked in the press](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fbill-cole-talks-debates-on-talkline%3Futm_source%3Dsoundcloud%26utm_campaign%3Dshare%26utm_medium%3Dfacebook&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_from_ct&n=5) and by [members of his own party](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fharrison-county-democrat-party-chair-on-debates%3Futm_source%3Dsoundcloud%26utm_campaign%3Dshare%26utm_medium%3Dfacebook&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_from_ct&n=6) for avoiding debates, Jim Justice finally agreed to face the voters for two debates.
Next week will be another busy one for Bill. On Monday, he'll travel to Huntington for the grand opening of the Huntington Victory Center and meet with volunteers and supporters who are ready to elect Bill Cole as the next Governor of West Virginia.

On Tuesday, he'll travel to Morgantown and speak at the West Virginia Business and Industry Council's regional meeting where he'll lay out his plan to tackle the drug epidemic impacting West Virginia families. First, implement stiffer penalties for drug dealers. Second, make sure treatment programs are available for drug addicts. Third, fund education programs to keep kids off drugs.

And on Thursday, he'll visit the state fair in Lewisburg and meet with voters from across West Virginia.

We look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail.

Team Cole [http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_from_ct&n=7)

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: My guess on what’s happening in Trump-land
body:
We can only do this with your help | Peter --

We don't know exactly what's going on here, but I have a guess.

Last month, Trump and the GOP raised over $80 million. And he hasn’t spent one dollar on any TV advertising. I’m not exaggerating -- literally since the general election began, he hasn’t spent any money whatsoever on one of the most critical components of a winning campaign.

The longer this goes on, the more likely it becomes that Trump has decided to bet everything on one final, major attack.

We have to anticipate that Trump’s going to spend big in the last lap of this race -- and we know that a flood of money in the final few weeks could undermine all the work we’ve put in to build this campaign. That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $1.2 million before midnight tonight. **[ Can you step up right now and help hit it? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you for your support.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYyMzU2OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNDIwNjU4S0&mt=2&rj=ODYyNDIwNjU4S0&rt=0) **

If the Trump campaign is making a bet that a last-minute mega-blitz will be just enough to carry it over the finish line, this team is taking a different approach.

We want to invest early and effectively. We want to register -- not scare -- voters. We want to compete in all 50 states.

We’re going to win decisively. We’re going to earn a mandate to govern.

subject: what are Montana values?

body:
---
Friend,

We know we send a lot of emails, but every single grassroots donation is so important.

Greg Gianforte has spent more than $1.7 million on TV right now trying to convince voters that -- despite all evidence to the contrary -- he understands Montana values. We need to make sure that our fundraising stays on track so we can show how phony his claim is. **[Will you help with a contribution of $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ky6W4y2WIzH9LputMvrBu9bHoxX6jW8w)**

* It's not a Montana value to file suit against the state to block stream access.
* It's not a Montana value to drain the rainy day fund to give huge tax giveaways to out-of-state corporations.
* It's not a Montana value to support discriminatory policies or give money to hate groups.
* It's not a Montana value to slash taxes for our wealthiest residents while throwing scraps to working families.
* It's not a Montana value to push a Koch-approved economic blueprint that compromises our fiscal responsibility.

**[Stand up for Montana values and help us hit our August fundraising benchmarks with a donation of $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5VafBZD4sCu%2F29moJ1pQN9bHoxX6jW8w)** This election isn't just about the next four years -- it's about the direction of our state.

Thanks,
Bullock HQ

subject: They said we couldn't
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Peter - We are constantly underestimated. They said we couldn’t win a primary; couldn’t get the nomination. That’s what they told the founding fathers too. That’s been the theme of our nation from the very beginning. But we’re Americans – “couldn’t” has never stopped us before, especially not when patriots come together for the sake of freedom! Prove Them Wrong All it takes is one person, one group of like-minded individuals, to start a movement and change the path of our nation. Our founding fathers faced the same odds, but they were determined to face the challenges ahead of them. Peter, right now, we are on the brink of making history and we face many of the same challenges. With all odds against my campaign and every media outlet in the bag for Crooked Hillary, we were facing an uphill battle before we even started. Critics and Hillary’s “experts” in the media are saying we CAN’T win this November. With your help, we are going to prove them wrong! Prove Them Wrong They said I couldn’t.... Run for President... Boy have we proved them wrong! Win Any Primaries... We won 37 states! Get the Nomination... Received more votes than any Republican in history. Take on Crooked Hillary... We have exposed her for the liar she is, and she is shaking in her boots terrified of facing us. Win the White House... We can and WILL, but I need your help to get there. This isn’t going to be easy, but the things worth fighting for rarely are. If I can count on your support for this campaign, please let me know by standing with my campaign right now. Peter, we can prove them wrong again, but I need your IMMEDIATE help. Prove Them Wrong I am running for President because our country and our citizens deserve better. President Obama, Nancy Pelosi, Harry Reid, (the list goes on and on), have made disastrous choices and decisions for our nation that have put our economy and safety in great peril. I’m running because I refuse to watch Crooked Hillary walk America off a cliff. Together we can restore our economy, strengthen our borders, revitalize our military and empower our country to be great again! This is a team effort. I can only prove them wrong with your help! Will you join me in making history by standing with my campaign right now? Let’s prove them wrong! Donald Trump P.S. Can you imagine what our country would be like if every time someone faced negativity they just gave up like the media wants us to now? America needs people like us to stand up when those in power plan to knock us down. This isn’t going to be easy, but the things worth fighting for rarely are. If I can count on your support for this campaign, please let me know by standing with my campaign right now. Prove Them Wrong

name: Sheriff Phil Plummer
subject: Shameful and disgusting
body:
| Peter \--

It’s shameful that Ted Strickland and his out-of-state allies are spending millions of dollars spreading dishonest and discredited attacks against Rob Portman. The latest of these lies is an attack on Rob’s record on drug prevention and criticizes Rob’s work fighting the heroin and prescription drug epidemic that is impacting Ohio.

I’m the Montgomery County Sheriff and see I the impact drug abuse has on Ohio families and communities every day. Take it from me: Rob Portman is a leader on this issue. He authored the Comprehensive Addiction and Recovery Act that was recently signed into law, and Rob's bill will help save lives and help keep our communities safe.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_sheriff?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sheriff_blast&n=1)
These false attacks on Rob are particularly concerning considering that when Ted Strickland was governor, he cut funding for mental health and drug addiction services by nearly 30 percent. His drastic budget cuts even closed two mental health hospitals that were providing much-needed care for Ohioans with mental health issues. Ted's decisions made it tougher for guys like me to keep you safe.

I hope you will join me in supporting Rob Portman for the U.S. Senate. Ohio families can’t afford to go back to the days of Ted Strickland.

Sincerely,

Phil Plummer
Montgomery County Sheriff [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sheriff_blast&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sheriff_blast&n=3)

---

body:
Democrats Attack Greitens Days Before Missouri GOP Primary

By Maggie Severns, POLITICO
7/28/2016 5:17 PM EST

A political group affiliated with the Democratic Governors Association is reserving ad time to attack GOP gubernatorial candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri, seeking to affect the race just five days before Republicans choose their nominee from a crowded field.

Two sources tracking media spending in the state said that Jobs and Opportunity, a 527 group funded by the DGA, has booked about a half-million dollars in broadcast TV and additional radio spending attacking Greitens. The DGA did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

The ad is set to start airing Friday. Audio, which a source said was from the ad, criticizes Greitens for accepting money from a donor accused of sexually abusing a woman.

"What does this victim accused of human trafficking have to do with your vote for governor? Well a man accused of abusing her for 13 years gave Eric Greitens $1 million," a narrator says in the ad. "While others returned his money, Greitens said he was honored to take it."

Greitens, a former Navy SEAL and political newcomer, has been picking up steam in the competitive GOP primary because of his charisma and status as an outsider. The ad is a clear indication that Democrats would rather not face Greitens in the general election. Polls have found the race between Greitens and the three other candidates extremely close, but a SurveyUSA poll released this week did find Greitens leading the pack with 25 percent, with opponent John Brunner behind him at 21 percent.

Missouri was the site of a notorious instance of Democratic primary meddling four years ago, when Democratic Sen. Claire McCaskill's campaign aired ads casting GOP Rep. Todd Akin as conservative before his Senate primary. Akin won the three-way Republican race and promptly imploded in the general election, losing to McCaskill by more than 15 percentage points.

The DGA tried to influence Republicans' gubernatorial primary in Colorado in 2014, funding a group that tried to boost conservative ex-Rep. Tom Tancredo. But the effort prompted a backlash and Tancredo ultimately lost the GOP primary.

The winner in the Missouri GOP primary will face current Attorney General Chris Koster, a moderate and rising star in the Democratic Party, in the general election.

Friend -- As Evan's finance director, I'm looking at contributions toward our mid-month deadline, and I have some bad news: At this rate, we're not going to hit our $15,000 goal. As of this morning, we're alarmingly short.

**But you can still turn this around.**We have over 24 hours before tomorrow night 's deadline. **If folks like you[pitch in now,](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50445/7be36b49/1ee2e25e/78f8dfed/971074715/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-midmonthaug?refcode=20160815.2&amount=25") we can hit our goal and take a big step closer to electing the senator Indiana needs. ******

A few reminders of what's at stake:
* ******An independent senator who puts Hoosiers first.****** Evan Bayh isn't beholden to any party or president. He's his own man. Todd Young, who's getting hundreds of thousands of dollars from the Koch brothers, can't say the same.

* ******A Senate that works.****** Evan knows you've had enough obstruction from the Senate. He's committed to working with both sides of the aisle to get things done for Indiana.

Friend, we have until tomorrow night.****[Will you pitch in now to help us hit our $15,000 and elect Evan?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50445/7be36b49/1ee2e25e/78f8dfed/971074715/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-midmonthaug?refcode=20160815.2&amount=25")****

Thanks a lot,

Emily Gurwitz
